rag_rules: Fix type mismatches between visible component ports and their expected classifiers in AGREE contracts.
Ensure AGREE contract assumptions and guarantees reference only visible identifiers from the component type scope.
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations in AGREE.
Place component type contracts in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in type-level contracts.
Validate that all AGREE expressions use compatible types for comparisons and assignments.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use nested 'if ... then ... else' for branching logic in AGREE.
Declare helper variables with correct scalar types: int, real, bool.
anti_patterns: Do not reference package-qualified identifiers in AGREE that are not present in the model.
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
